anatomy.description: Secondary icon-only button on the left side. Opens the chat/messages screen.
Central pill element. Displays the current state of the user's plan. Contains an optional icon plus title and subtitle text.

subParts.description: 20px icon inside the pill. Calendar for event/reservation/pickup states, car for ride state.
Primary text label inside the pill. Shows the event name or ride status.
Secondary text below the title. Shows time or location detail.

anatomy.description: Circular user avatar on the right side. Fixed size MD (40px).

values.description: Empty state. No event planned. Pill shows 'No plans for today' with a CTA arrow.
Active event with pickup time. Pill shows event name and 'Pick up at [time]'.
Active event with reservation time. Pill shows event name and 'Reserve at [time]'.
Active ride in progress. Pill shows 'On the way' and the destination address. Blue pill background.

sizeNote: Single size only. Width: 390px (full screen width), Height: 60px. No size variants.
usageContext: Exclusively used in the Home screen of the customer app.
Positioned at the top of the Home screen, below the status bar.
Reflects the user's current plan state in real time.
notes: Component renamed from 'App Header' to 'Header Home' to reflect its exclusive use on the Home screen.
The pill background changes only for the Ride state (blue). All other states use the translucent event-pill background.
The icon inside the pill changes between calendar (event states) and car (ride state).
